hero.title: Rooftop Solar Panel Cleaning Robot India
hero.subtitle: MINY is Taypro's compact waterless robot for C&I and commercial rooftops — lighter footprint, register interest for launch updates and pilot availability.
hero.imgAlt: Taypro MINY compact rooftop solar panel cleaning robot, coming soon

intro.title: Robotic cleaning sized for smaller rooftop portfolios
intro.p1: Utility-scale robots are over-specified for many commercial and industrial rooftops. MINY brings Taypro's waterless cleaning philosophy into a compact chassis designed for tighter layouts, lower parapets, and plants where every kilogram and centimetre of deck space matters.
intro.p2: We are finalising field trials with EPC and asset-owner partners across India. Share your rooftop plant profile to receive launch timelines, specification sheets, and pilot availability.

highlightsSection.title: Why teams are asking for MINY

0.title: Compact for smaller rooftops
0.body: Sized for commercial and industrial rooftops where full utility-scale robots cannot deploy, without sacrificing Taypro's panel-safe cleaning approach.

1.title: Waterless Taypro cleaning
1.body: Dry cleaning methodology aligned with Taypro's proven waterless systems, no wash water logistics on congested roof decks.

2.title: Distributed plant economics
2.body: Targeted at portfolios of smaller rooftops where manual labour cost and soiling losses compound across many sites.

3.title: Early access programme
3.body: Register interest now for specification previews, pilot slots, and regional launch updates from our Pune engineering team.

0.title: Commercial & industrial rooftops
0.body: Factories, warehouses, and campus buildings with 100 kW–2 MW arrays that need consistent dry cleaning without heavy equipment.

1.title: Constrained roof layouts
1.body: Plants with limited walkway space, parapets, or HVAC clutter where a full-size autonomous robot is impractical.

2.title: Multi-site O&M programmes
2.body: Operators managing many small rooftops who want a standardised robotic platform instead of ad-hoc manual crews per site.

notify.title: Get notified when MINY launches
notify.subtitle: Tell us about your rooftop plant and we will share specs, pricing guidance, and pilot opportunities as we approach general availability.
